goal: Supabase/Postgres-backed multi-organization Orun SaaS control plane
next_focus: Task 0130 (PERF1 console client cache) DONE — merged PR #216. @tanstack/react-query with stale-while-revalidate: cached reads, shared orgs query (OrgScope no longer refetches org list per page), prefetch-on-hover, app-frame paints immediately, optimistic archive via cache. Verified vs live stage: navigating 5 org-scoped pages added ZERO org-list refetches; revisits paint from cache (no skeleton); hover prefetch fires; zero console errors. Remaining PERF cluster (server-side latency, where the real TTFB lives): 0131 PERF2 edge bearer-resolution cache (KV/Cache API), 0132 PERF3 DB connection reuse + parallelize billing + member N+1 + indexes + Hyperdrive cache verify, 0133 PERF4 hop reduction/parallelization + Server-Timing observability. NOTE: 0129=B1 GitHub OAuth (another session, now merged — login page shows 'Continue with GitHub'). PERF CLUSTER SCOPED (perf analysis 2026-06-02): roadmap §Performance & Caching (PERF) + ai/tasks/task-0130..0133. Measured live-stage server TTFB: profile~1.0s, orgs~1.6s, projects~2.1s, billing/summary~3.1s; repeats never faster → NO caching at any layer. Root causes: per-request postgres client create+dispose per worker (TLS/auth handshake dominates, recurs per hop), no bearer-resolution cache (identity hop +2 DB queries every request), 4-hop serial fan-out, billing-summary 4 sequential queries, member-list N+1, console has zero client cache (useAsync refetches every mount; OrgScope refetches full org list per page), no Cache-Control. Tasks by impact÷effort: 0130 PERF1 console client cache+SWR+prefetch (frontend, biggest perceived win), 0131 PERF2 edge bearer-resolution cache (KV/Cache API), 0132 PERF3 DB connection reuse + parallelize billing + member N+1 + indexes + Hyperdrive cache verify, 0133 PERF4 hop-reduction/parallelize + Server-Timing observability. Suggested new resources: Workers KV, Cloudflare Cache API/Tiered Cache, Analytics Engine (metrics), Durable Objects (later hot state), Supabase read replica (at scale). NOTE: Task 0129 = B1 GitHub OAuth (another session) — do not reuse that number. PRIOR: Task 0128 (B11 provider-neutral billing subscription & plan lifecycle) DONE — merged PR #211, verified LIVE on stage: a brand-new org now auto-gets the FREE plan at bootstrap (active subscription) with 4 real materialized entitlement rows (source=plan: limit.projects=3/environments=3/members=5 + feature.custom_domains), creates a project off the real row, and getBillingSummary returns plan=free+active. assign-plan internal seam (POST /v1/internal/billing/plan/assign) covers create+change idempotently; membership bootstrap assigns free best-effort over BILLING_WORKER. PR #209 default-map demoted to last-resort safety net. NEXT human-independent candidates: (1) U7 public upgrade/downgrade api-edge routes + designed upgrade UX over the assign-plan primitive (also exposes pro upgrade), (2) explicit cancelSubscription endpoint, (3) pre-0128 org backfill (assign free to orgs lacking a subscription) to retire the safety-net map, (4) api-edge /v1/notifications/* facade to unblock the U11 notification-preferences console surface, (5) console auth-hydration race fix (deep-link reload bounces to /login). B6 (Stripe), B1/B10 remain human-blocked on creds. PRIOR shipped: PR #209 fix(billing): free-tier default entitlements (limit.projects=3/environments=3/members=5 on not_found) — root cause was that billing has ONLY read handlers, upsertEntitlement is never called, and no subscription/plan-assignment exists, so every new org was permanently blocked from creating its first project. Verified LIVE on stage post-deploy: project create (prj_87830ed) + environment create (env_3fcfe) succeed, and the U11 optimistic archive persists (DELETE→200). Adjacent findings logged in task-0128 'Adjacent findings': api-edge notifications facade missing (blocks U11 notif-prefs), console auth-hydration race (deep-link reload bounces to /login before token hydrates). PRIOR: Task 0127 (U11 Vercel-standard console) DONE — merged as PRs #204 (slice A: primitives Select/Tooltip/Sheet/Switch/Checkbox + mobile nav + extensible Cmd-K registry), #205 (slice B: usage & quota), #207 (slice C: account profile + org/project settings + optimistic archive). Spec scoped in #203. All browser-verified against live stage; main green (typecheck/lint/135 tests/next build). One U11 surface DEFERRED as backend-blocked: notification preferences — api-edge has no notifications facade (SDK methods exist but GET /v1/notifications/preferences returns not_found), so the console can't consume it; unblock = a /v1/notifications/* edge slice (see ai/deferred.md). The dependency-free Switch primitive is in place for that. Rename/update of org/project/env remains out (no API). B-track forward legs B1/B6/B10 still human-blocked; B9-console DEFERRED on a human architecture decision; P1 promote-flow likely next backend-leaning leg.
